news.title: Key milestone met for Givaudan's new natural, acid stable blue colour in Europe
news.short_description: The European Food Safety Authority (EFSA) releases positive feedback on the risk assessment for Givaudan's Everzure® Galdieria, a vibrant natural alternative to the synthetic Brilliant Blue FCF (E133) colour.

news.title: Givaudan offers new possibilities for natural blue colours with acid stable ingredient
news.short_description: With recent US FDA approval, Everzure™ Galdieria will provide a vibrant alternative to Blue 1 for beverages & confections

news.title: Our statement on the tragic, fatal incident at our Sense Colour Factory in Louisville, USA
news.short_description: We are profoundly saddened to confirm that two of our team members lost their lives in a tragic accident at our Sense Colour factory in Louisville, Kentucky, USA, on Tuesday.

news.title: Givaudan Sense Colour Launches Natural Red 40 Alternative
news.short_description: Amaize® Orange-red provides a bright orange-red shade with a simple label and neutral taste

news.title: Givaudan Sense Colour Announces Leadership Change
news.short_description: Ann Leonard to transition to President of the Sense Colour Business Unit

news.title: DDW Transitions to Givaudan SenseColour
news.short_description: Takes Next Step in Integration with Givaudan

news.title: Fermentalg & DDW Initiate Pre-Commercialization of Innovative Acid Stable Blue
news.short_description: Fermentalg meets food colour technical milestone and initiates the pre-commercialization of Innovative Acid Stable Blue Natural Color with DDW, part of Givaudan

news.title: Titanium Dioxide No Longer Permitted as Food Colour in EU
news.short_description: The EU Commission Regulation (EU) 1022/63 declaring that Titanium Dioxide, or TiO2, can no longer be used as a food colour additive in the European Union was published on 18th January 2021.

news.title: Acquisition Complete: DDW Joins Givaudan
news.short_description: Establishes global leadership position in natural colors

news.title: DDW CEO Transition
news.short_description: DDW is pleased to announce that President and Chief Operating Officer, Elaine Gravatte will transition to the role of President and CEO.
